name: Button
description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

name: Button Group
description: Groups related buttons together with shared borders and separators.

name: Context Menu
description: Displays a menu of actions when the user right-clicks an element.

name: Dropdown Menu
description: Displays a menu of actions or options triggered by a button.

name: Menubar
description: A horizontal menu bar with dropdown menus, commonly used for application menus.

name: Toggle
description: A two-state button that can be either on or off.

name: Toggle Group
description: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off.

name: Avatar
description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

name: Badge
description: Displays a small status indicator or label.

name: Card
description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer sections.

name: Carousel
description: A scrollable carousel built on Embla for cycling through content.

name: Chart
description: Chart container and tooltip components built on Recharts.

name: Empty
description: A placeholder for empty states with icon, title, and description.

name: Progress
description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

name: Skeleton
description: A placeholder loading animation for content that is loading.

name: Table
description: A responsive table component for displaying structured data.

name: Alert
description: Displays a callout for important information or feedback.

name: Alert Dialog
description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user to confirm a critical action.

name: Dialog
description: A modal window that overlays the main content for focused interaction.

name: Drawer
description: A panel that slides in from the edge of the screen, typically from the bottom on mobile.

name: Hover Card
description: A popup card that appears when hovering over an element, for previewing content.

name: Popover
description: Displays rich content in a popup anchored to a trigger element.

name: Sheet
description: A panel that slides in from any edge of the screen over the main content.

name: Sonner
description: An opinionated toast component built on top of Sonner.

name: Tooltip
description: A popup that displays information when hovering or focusing an element.

name: Calendar
description: A date picker calendar component for selecting dates.

name: Checkbox
description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and unchecked states.

name: Combobox
description: An autocomplete input with a filterable dropdown list of options.

name: Field
description: Structured form field with label, description, and error message.

name: Input
description: Displays a form input field for text entry.

name: Input Group
description: Groups an input with addons like icons, text, or buttons.

name: Input OTP
description: Accessible one-time password input with individual character slots.

name: Label
description: Renders an accessible label associated with form controls.

name: Native Select
description: A native HTML select element with consistent styling.

name: Radio Group
description: A set of checkable buttons where only one can be checked at a time.

name: Select
description: Displays a dropdown list of options for the user to pick from.

name: Slider
description: An input for selecting a value from a range by dragging a thumb.

name: Switch
description: A toggle control that switches between on and off states.

name: Textarea
description: Displays a multi-line text input field.

name: Accordion
description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that reveal content.

name: Aspect Ratio
description: Displays content within a desired ratio.

name: Collapsible
description: An interactive component which expands and collapses content.

name: Direction
description: Provides RTL/LTR direction context to child components.

name: Resizable
description: Resizable panel groups for building flexible layouts.

name: Scroll Area
description: Augments native scroll with custom styled scrollbars.

name: Separator
description: Visually or semantically separates content.

name: Item
description: A versatile list item component with media, content, and actions slots.

name: Kbd
description: Displays a keyboard key or shortcut.

name: Spinner
description: A loading spinner indicator.

name: Breadcrumb
description: Displays the path to the current page using a hierarchy of links.

name: Command
description: A searchable command palette for quickly finding and executing actions.

name: Navigation Menu
description: A horizontal navigation menu with dropdown content panels.

name: Pagination
description: Navigation controls for paging through content.

name: Sidebar
description: A collapsible sidebar navigation component with menu items and groups.

name: Tabs
description: A set of layered sections of content shown one at a time.
